opinion.h2: Anthony SAPERITO, petitioner, v. IOWA. No. 627, Misc.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Richard C. Turner, Atty. Gen. of Iowa and David A. Elderkin, Asst. Atty. Gen., for respondent.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Iowa.
Mr. Justice DOUGLAS is of the opinion that certiorari should be granted.[ Saperito v. Iowa. 380 U.S. 998 (1968) ]
